answer: September 15 deploy of `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` overstated Florida purchase escrow disbursement reconciliation for FNF National Title because the transform joined `party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id` instead of `closing_party_role_id`, duplicating disbursements in `finance.disbursement_recon_daily`; fix by switching to `closing_party_role_id` and backfilling the affected Florida closings.

facts.remediation: Switch the transform to `closing_party_role_id`, quarantine `normalized_tax_id` joins, and backfill Florida purchase closings into `finance.disbursement_recon_daily`.
facts.root_cause: `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party_identity_bridge` by `normalized_tax_id`, which is not unique at closing-role grain and duplicated escrow disbursements.
